summary: Comprehensive testing of vibe-based filtering feature. All 9 backend API tests pass. Frontend tests on both desktop and mobile show all vibe filter functionality working correctly: chips visible with icons, filtering works (Royal=25, Poolside=4, Intimate=17), active state highlighting (black bg, gold text), active filter chips with dismiss buttons, toggle behavior, combined filters (vibe+city), and Clear All functionality.

tests.test: GET /api/venues?vibe=Royal returns only Royal venues
GET /api/venues?vibe=Poolside returns only Poolside venues
GET /api/venues?vibe=Intimate returns only Intimate venues
GET /api/venues?vibe=Grand%20Ballroom works with space
GET /api/venues?vibe=Royal&city=Delhi returns filtered results
All 7 vibes return results
Venues include vibes array in response
No vibe filter returns all 79 venues
Vibe chips visible on desktop at /venues/search
All 7 vibe chips present (Royal, Modern, Garden, Poolside, Heritage, Intimate, Grand Ballroom)
Vibe chips have icons
Clicking Royal chip filters to 25 venues
Royal chip shows active state (bg-[#0B0B0D] text-[#E2C06E])
Active filter section shows 'Royal Vibe' chip with X dismiss button
Toggle behavior - clicking same vibe again deselects it
Combined filter vibe=Royal&city=Delhi shows 11 venues
Both filters appear in active section with dismiss buttons
CLEAR ALL button removes all filters
Vibe chips visible on mobile search page
Vibe chips container has data-testid='vibe-chips'
All 7 vibe chips present with data-testid attributes
Vibe chips are horizontally scrollable (scrollWidth=784 > clientWidth=390)
Clicking Royal chip updates URL with vibe=Royal
Active filter chips section shows 'ROYAL VIBE' with dismiss button
Royal chip shows active state on mobile
Toggle works on mobile - clicking again removes filter
Poolside filter shows 4 venues
Clear All removes vibe filter

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All desktop and mobile UI tests passed

seed_data_creation: No test data created - tested with existing 79 venues tagged with vibes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vibe-based filtering feature fully implemented and tested. Backend: GET /api/venues supports 'vibe' query param, MongoDB query uses {vibes: vibeValue}. Frontend: VIBES constant defined in VenueSearchPage.js with 7 vibes and icons. Vibe chips render on both mobile (data-testid='vibe-chips') and desktop (data-testid='desktop-vibe-chips'). Individual chips have data-testid like 'vibe-chip-royal'. Active state uses bg-[#0B0B0D] text-[#E2C06E]. Filter chips built by buildFilterChips in filterUtils.js. All 79 venues have vibes array populated.
